name: Easy Cinnamon Strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease a jelly roll pan (15 1/2 x 10 1/2 x 1).
3. In a large bowl, mix sugar, margarine, and egg yolk.
4. Stir in flour and cinnamon until combined.
5. Press the dough into the prepared pan.
6. Beat the egg white and water until foamy.
7. Brush the egg wash over the dough.
8. Sprinkle walnuts evenly on top.
9. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until very light brown.
10. Remove from oven and immediately cut into about 3 x 1 inch strips.
11. Transfer to a wire rack to cool.
Makes 3 1/2 dozen cookies.
